title: Stock markets and geopolitical tensions: A 3-stage analysis of last 7 crashes
summary: WhiteOak Capital Mutual Fund highlights that geopolitical crises, including the Iran–Israel war, mainly trigger short-term panic. Historical data shows markets recover quickly, with fundamentals like corporate earnings and valuations driving long-term returns. Investors are advised to stay disciplined, rebalance systematically, and treat crises as opportunities rather than reasons to sell.

title: How systematic active investing combines data, discipline and dynamic allocation to help deliver alpha
summary: Systematic investing merges human judgment with machine intelligence for a disciplined, scalable approach. India's evolving capital markets, marked by retail growth and digitization, make it ideal for Systematic Active Equity (SAE) strategies. SAE combines alpha-seeking with data-driven execution, offering dynamic portfolios, integrated risk management, and reduced behavioral biases.

title: BSE, NSE organise mock trading session today: Check timing, purpose, other details
summary: BSE and National Stock Exchange of India are conducting a mock trading session on Saturday across equity, commodity and currency derivatives segments. The exercise will test system readiness, disaster recovery infrastructure and trading applications, while helping brokers and market participants familiarise themselves with exchange processes under simulated market conditions.

title: FIIs sell Indian equities worth Rs 52,704 crore in March, so far; Friday records its highest single-day outflow in 2026
summary: Foreign portfolio investors (FPIs) sold Indian equities worth Rs 52,704 crore in the first half of March, with the biggest single-day outflow of 2026 recorded on Friday. The continued selling comes amid escalating geopolitical tensions linked to the Iran-Israel-US conflict and rising global uncertainty affecting investor sentiment.

title: Accenture chief Julia Sweet lays out conditions for promotion, warns of job loss: ‘If you want to get promoted…'
summary: Accenture is prioritising AI proficiency for promotions, stating employees must adapt to AI tools to advance in their careers. The company is investing $3 billion over three years to embed AI across operations and aims to double its AI talent to 80,000 professionals.
